# Pharisees

<aside>
💡 A splash of a pharisee character would accentuate the [Nivana sorceress arc](../../TWOLD%20Plot/Arcs/Nivana%20sorceress%20arc%20ba9bd93692634691a49a337080acf339.md).

I’ve planned on having such a character but keep forgetting.  Generally I’ve envisioned some kind of Catholic priest type that is Nivana’s friend and then rejects her when she turns to magic.
